use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HIV-1 IN AN ADULT IN COMBINATION WITH RILPIVIRINE
TREATMENT OF HIV-1 INFECTION IN ADULTS AND ADOLESCENTS 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER AND WEIGHING AT LEAST 35 KG
